title: ochnella afzelii
intro: Ochnella afzelii, also known as the African moon tree or Ochna afzelii, is a plant species in the family Ochnaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ochnella afzelii include reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
